title: 🌀 Strange Attractors (General)
name: Strange Attractors (General)
what_it_is: Dynamic systems where trajectories settle into complex, never-repeating loops. Includes Lorenz, Rössler, Duffing, etc.

chaotic spiral fields trace emotional charge in ambient geometry
